steps.title: Use the established place
steps.content: The first sentence identifies the Tres Zapotes archaeological site in Veracruz. The second sentence then describes a statue found at that same place.

steps.title: Reject nonspatial links
steps.content: A would restate the previous idea, but the statue is new information. C would compare two similar things before the second location appears. D would imply a cause. The remaining transition means "at this place." The answer is B.
